official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound tag_query empty CompoundTag fixture
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns tag_query to packet id 0x7b.
The empty fixture body is transaction id VarInt followed by FriendlyByteBuf.writeNbt empty CompoundTag bytes.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, NBT fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty NBT payload policy, command block/entity query behavior, or UI behavior.
